validData.subject: A reasonably long subject line for testing maximum character limits in forms
validData.description: This is a longer description to test how the form handles multiple lines of text input. The purpose is to verify that the text area properly expands and handles paragraph-length content without truncation or layout issues.

specialCharacters.subject: A very long string that repeats itself many times to test the maximum character limit of the subject field and ensure that the form properly handles or rejects extremely long inputs without causing layout breakage or backend errors. This text is intentionally verbose and repetitive to simulate edge case scenarios.
